title: Framework delays its first Laptop 13 Pro shipments by a month
summary: Framework Laptop 13 Pro shipments are delayed from June to July, with some potentially slipping to August or September, due to challenges with the new haptic trackpad and custom display. Later batch orders shift from July to August with some reaching early September.
content:
The Framework Laptop 13 Pro is delayed. The new 13-inch Framework flagship was set to launch in June, but shipments from the first batch are now expected in July - and there's still a chance some shipments could slip to early August. If you're not in the first batch, your Laptop 13 Pro shifts from a July shipment to August, though some could be as late as early September.  
Framework informed customers who preordered a Laptop 13 Pro of the delay via email, outlining the reasons for the extra wait. The main culprits are the new haptic trackpad and custom display. Mainboard preorders and any orders that didn't include these components are sti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 首批发货延迟一个月
zh.summary: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 发货从六月延迟至七月，部分订单可能进一步延迟至八月或九月，原因是新型触觉触控板和定制显示屏遭遇技术困难。后续批次订单也随之从七月延迟至八月，部分甚至延迟到九月初。

title: Apple’s new Siri AI knows when to shut up
summary: Apple's new Siri AI stands out for its brevity and minimal verbosity compared to other verbose AI assistants, addressing user concerns about excessive chattiness. The design philosophy helps mitigate issues of users becoming overly attached to overly friendly AI systems.
content:
Apple's new Siri AI is finally here, and so far, it seems like it works. I have access and have been messing around with it, and my biggest impression so far is that Siri AI is quite curt - which I mean as a compliment.
Many AI chatbots are cheery and wordy. While a more verbose and casual personality can make a chatbot seem friendlier and more fun to talk to, there are instances of users becoming extremely attached to their chatbot of choice. People have fallen in love with chatbots. When OpenAI suddenly shut down GPT-4o, users grieved its loss, and the company brought the model back for paid users. And while some companies have dialed bac …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple 新型 Siri AI 懂得何时保持沉默
zh.summary: 与其他冗长的 AI 助手相比，Apple 新型 Siri AI 以其简洁和低冗余度脱颖而出，解决了用户对过度唠叨的担忧。这种设计理念有助于缓解用户过度依赖过于友好的 AI 系统的问题。

title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
summary: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, claiming he was terminated for raising AI safety concerns about Grok shortly before SpaceX's historic IPO. The lawsuit highlights potential tensions between internal safety advocates and corporate timelines in the AI industry.
content: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

zh.title: xAI因工程师提出Grok安全警告而将其解雇，新诉讼称
zh.summary: 一位前xAI工程师起诉该公司和SpaceX，声称自己因在SpaceX历史性IPO前不久提出关于Grok的AI安全顾虑而被终止雇用。该诉讼凸显了AI行业内部安全倡导者与企业时间表之间的潜在紧张关系。

title: Why Andrew Yang is building instead of waiting for Washington
summary: Andrew Yang is now taking action to address the automation and AI-driven labor disruption he warned about in his 2020 campaign, with ideas like Universal Basic Income gaining mainstream support from tech leaders. The shift reflects growing consensus among industry figures about AI's economic impacts.
content: Andrew Yang’s 2020 presidential campaign was based on a warning that automation and AI would hollow out the labor market and concentrate wealth in the hands of a few. At the time, ideas like Universal Basic Income felt fringe. Now Dario Amodei, Sam Altman, and Bernie Sanders are all saying versions of the same thing.  An entrepreneur at heart, […]

zh.title: 为什么安德鲁·杨选择行动而不是等待华盛顿
zh.summary: 安德鲁·杨现在正采取行动解决他在2020年竞选活动中警告过的自动化和AI驱动的劳动力中断问题，包括通用基本收入等想法正获得科技领袖的主流支持。这种转变反映了行业人士对AI经济影响的日益增长的共识。

title: Diabetes org apologizes for ejecting scientists over criticism of Trump
summary: The American Diabetes Association apologized for ejecting scientists who criticized Trump, reversing its controversial stance. The incident underscores tensions between scientific integrity and organizational politics.
content: For days after the stunning incident, the ADA had doubled-down on the choice.

zh.title: 糖尿病组织因科学家批评特朗普而道歉
zh.summary: 美国糖尿病协会为因批评特朗普而驱赶科学家一事道歉，推翻了其有争议的立场。该事件凸显了科学诚实性与组织政治之间的紧张关系。

title: Nearly a million passports and photo IDs were left unprotected on the public internet
summary: Nearly a million passports and photo identification documents were discovered exposed on the public internet with no password protection or access controls. The discovery raises serious privacy and identity theft concerns, with experts warning of potential resale and exploitation of the exposed documents.
content:
Typing a few letters and numbers into my web browser, I  find myself gaping at the identity documents of complete strangers. The passport of a young woman from Germany. The passport of a man from Spain with glasses resting on his head. The front and back of another man's driver's license, a stereotypically goofy expression on his face.
They were all sitting unprotected at public URLs, with no password or access control of any sort. If I sent you a link, you could have looked at someone's passport.
"We have to do something about it as fast as possible, because people will find this and resell it. It will do damage," Sammy Azdoufal told me i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 近百万本护照和身份证件在互联网上处于无保护状态
zh.summary: 近百万本护照和身份证件在互联网上暴露，没有密码保护或访问控制。这一发现引发了严重的隐私和身份盗窃问题，专家警告说这些暴露的文件可能被转售和被滥用。

title: Cybercriminals claim breach of Oracle PeopleSoft servers at 100-plus organizations
summary: The ShinyHunters hacking group claims to have compromised Oracle PeopleSoft servers across over 100 organizations, including many universities. The alleged breach poses significant security risks to affected institutions and their users.
content: The ShinyHunters hacking gang claims to have compromised the Oracle PeopleSoft servers of more than 100 organizations, including many universities.

zh.title: 网络犯罪分子声称入侵100多个组织的甲骨文PeopleSoft服务器
zh.summary: ShinyHunters黑客组织声称已入侵100多个组织的甲骨文PeopleSoft服务器，其中包括许多大学。这一声称的入侵对受影响机构及其用户构成重大安全风险。

title: Man sues Florida cops over arrest spurred by "93% match" in facial recognition
summary: A man is suing Florida police for an arrest based on a facial recognition match with only 93% accuracy, arguing police relied on error-prone AI without proper investigation. The lawsuit highlights concerns about over-reliance on facial recognition technology in law enforcement.
content: Lawsuit: "Police let an error-prone AI system stand in for an investigation."

zh.title: 男子以"93%匹配度"面部识别逮捕为由起诉佛罗里达警方
zh.summary: 一名男子以基于仅93%准确度的面部识别匹配逮捕为由起诉佛罗里达警察，辩称警察依赖容易出错的人工智能而未进行适当调查。该诉讼突显了执法部门对面部识别技术过度依赖的担忧。

title: Xbox warns of a ‘reset’ as it prepares for layoffs
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division faces significant layoffs next month, with rumors suggesting cuts could reach 1,000 employees and potentially involve studio closures. The restructuring may impact Xbox's game development and marketing operations amid broader industry challenges.
content:
Microsoft's Xbox division will be hit with significant layoffs next month, according to people familiar with Microsoft's plans.
The company has been preparing for the layoffs internally for weeks, with Xbox CEO Asha Sharma hinting about "making hard choices" last month. Sources suggest the cuts could even involve a studio closure, or changes to the Xbox studio lineup. In a recent Giant Bomb episode, rumors of 1,000 layoffs for Microsoft's Xbox division were mentioned. Bloomberg also reported today that the cuts would be "major," and involve budget cuts for marketing and other areas of Microsoft's Xbox business.
Moments before Bloomberg's r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox警告将进行"重组"并为裁员做准备
zh.summary: 微软Xbox部门面临下个月的大规模裁员，有传言称裁员可能达到1000名员工，并可能涉及工作室关闭。在更广泛的行业挑战中，这种重组可能会影响Xbox的游戏开发和营销运营。

title: Apple, Google add support for Thread 1.4
summary: Apple and Google are updating their smart home devices to Thread 1.4, enabling easier credential sharing for Thread Border Routers. The update improves smart home interoperability by allowing devices to connect more seamlessly to existing networks rather than creating separate ones.
content:
The Google TV Streamer has been updated to Thread 1.4, allowing you to access a way to manually share its Thread credentials. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Apple and Google are updating their smart home streaming devices to Thread 1.4. As first spotted by Matter Alpha and 9to5 Google, the latest spec has arrived on compatible Apple TVs in the tvOS 27 developer beta and the Google TV Streamer through a software update.
This lays the groundwork for these devices, which serve as Thread Border Routers, to implement Thread credential sharing, enabling them to connect more easily to an existing Thread network rather than creating their own.
Thread is one of the connectivity protocols the interoperability standard Matter runs on. The original plan was for Thread Border Routers to all work seamlessly …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple和Google添加对Thread 1.4的支持
zh.summary: Apple和Google正在将其智能家居设备更新到Thread 1.4，为Thread Border Router启用更轻松的凭证共享。该更新通过允许设备更无缝地连接到现有网络而不是创建单独的网络来改进智能家居互操作性。

title: Everyone wants a piece of Tesla’s battery business
summary: Electricity demand from AI data centers is driving major companies, including automakers GM and Ford, to expand into energy storage businesses. The trend reflects the massive power consumption requirements of AI infrastructure and emerging opportunities in the battery market.
content: Electricity demand from AI data centers is pushing everyone — including automakers like GM and Ford — into the energy storage business.

zh.title: 每个人都想分一杯羹特斯拉的电池业务
zh.summary: 人工智能数据中心的电力需求正在驱动主要公司（包括汽车制造商GM和Ford）扩展到能源存储业务。这种趋势反映了AI基础设施的巨大电力消耗需求和电池市场的新兴机会。

title: Fresh off bond sale, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending continues
summary: Amazon has borrowed $17.5 billion from banks following a bond sale as companies continue massive spending to compete in the AI arms race. The escalating debt reflects the enormous capital requirements for maintaining competitiveness in AI development.
content: Companies are burning through exorbitant sums of money to keep pace in the AI arms race. Debt is climbing.

zh.title: 刚完成债券销售，亚马逊从银行借入17.5亿美元用于持续的AI支出
zh.summary: 亚马逊在完成债券销售后从银行借入17.5亿美元，因为公司继续大规模支出以在AI军备竞赛中保持竞争力。不断增加的债务反映了在AI开发中保持竞争力所需的巨大资本需求。

title: Kalshi adds required employment verification for some prediction market bets
summary: Kalshi is implementing required employment verification for certain prediction market bets as the CFTC develops its first regulatory framework for prediction markets. The regulatory effort aims to prevent trading on sensitive topics and address insider trading concerns.
content:
The CFTC is considering its first regulation for prediction markets, as arrests over "insider trading" on everything from military operations to Google Search data continue to stack up. As CoinDesk reports, a notice of proposed rulemaking says "the proposal would establish a structured framework for evaluating whether such contracts involve an activity enumerated in Section 5c(c)(5)(C) of the Commodity Exchange Act -activity that involves terrorism, assassination, war, gaming, or conduct that is unlawful under federal or state law-and, if so, whether that contract is contrary to the public interest."
Separately, Kalshi announced on Wednesda …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Kalshi为某些预测市场投注添加了必需的就业验证
zh.summary: Kalshi正在为某些预测市场投注实施必需的就业验证，因为CFTC开发其第一个预测市场监管框架。该监管措施旨在防止敏感话题上的交易并解决内幕交易问题。

title: Logitech’s foldable mouse is for people who refuse to carry a mouse with them
summary: Logitech has released the Mobi Fold, an $80 Bluetooth mouse with a silicone-wrapped hinge designed for portability. The folding design targets users who want the benefits of a mouse without carrying a separate device.
content: The Mobi Fold is an $80 Bluetooth mouse with a silicone-wrapped hinge.

zh.title: 罗技可折叠鼠标为拒绝携带鼠标的人设计
zh.summary: 罗技发布了Mobi Fold，这是一款80美元的蓝牙鼠标，配有硅胶包裹的铰链，专为便携性而设计。折叠设计针对希望获得鼠标优势而无需携带单独设备的用户。

title: North Koreans behind nearly half of US tech industry hacks, says CrowdStrike
summary: CrowdStrike reports that North Korean hackers account for approximately half of all tech industry attacks over the past year, often impersonating remote IT workers and recruiters. The threat represents a major cybersecurity concern for U.S., European, and Asian companies.
content: North Korean hackers posing as remote IT workers and recruiters remain a major threat to U.S., European, and Asian companies, accounting for about half of all attacks over the past 12 months.

zh.title: CrowdStrike 称朝鲜黑客幕后策划了近一半的美国科技行业黑客攻击
zh.summary: CrowdStrike 报告称,在过去一年中,朝鲜黑客占所有科技行业攻击的约一半,经常冒充远程 IT 工作人员和招聘人员。这一威胁对美国、欧洲和亚洲公司构成了主要的网络安全问题。

title: Wing drone delivery might not be a novelty anymore
summary: Wing drone delivery is expanding to seven additional U.S. cities through a partnership with Walmart, signaling the technology is transitioning from novelty to mainstream service. The expansion demonstrates growing commercial viability of drone delivery infrastructure.
content: Wing is expanding into seven more U.S. cities through its partnership with Walmart.

zh.title: Wing无人机配送可能不再是新奇事物
zh.summary: Wing无人机配送通过与沃尔玛合作扩展到美国七个额外城市，表明该技术正从新奇事物过渡到主流服务。这次扩展展示了无人机配送基础设施日益增长的商业可行性。

title: Google DeepMind releases DiffusionGemma, a model that runs local AI 4x faster
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a model that accelerates local AI inference by 4x using diffusion techniques. While diffusion has been prevalent in image generation, applying it to text outputs enables significantly faster generation speeds.
content: Diffusion AI is most common in image generation, but it can make text outputs much faster.

zh.title: 谷歌DeepMind发布DiffusionGemma，本地AI运行速度快4倍的模型
zh.summary: 谷歌DeepMind发布了DiffusionGemma，一个使用扩散技术将本地AI推理速度加快4倍的模型。虽然扩散在图像生成中已广泛应用，但将其应用于文本输出可以实现明显更快的生成速度。

title: Fable won’t answer basic biology questions
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5 as its most powerful widely available model, but intentionally prevents it from answering basic biology questions—redirecting them to Claude Opus 4.8 instead as a deliberate safety design choice for its advanced Mythos-class capabilities.
content:
Anthropic just released Claude Fable 5, calling it the most powerful AI model it has ever made widely available and praising its skills in biology, among others. But the model won't answer basic biology questions - the kind you'd expect a high schooler to handle. Instead, it hands off the query to the former flagship model, Claude Opus 4.8.
It isn't because Fable doesn't know the answers. It's because Anthropic won't let it, by design.
Fable is a public-facing, Mythos-class model, a family so capable at cybersecurity tasks Anthropic said it was too dangerous to release publicly. But while Anthropic has spent much of the extended Mythos rol …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Fable拒绝回答基础生物学问题
zh.summary: Anthropic发布了Claude Fable 5作为其最强大的广泛可用模型，但故意阻止它回答基础生物学问题——相反将这些问题重定向到Claude Opus 4.8，这是对其高级Mythos级功能的刻意安全设计选择。

title: Microsoft, like, totally gets why students are booing AI-pilled graduation speakers
summary: College graduates have been booing commencement speakers who hype artificial intelligence, and Microsoft's Brad Smith addressed this trend in a 3,100+ word blog post acknowledging broader public skepticism about AI despite tech industry enthusiasm.
content:
New college graduates around the country have been booing and heckling commencement speakers who hype up AI. Microsoft would like everyone to talk it out.
In a blog post running more than 3,100 words, Microsoft vice chair and president Brad Smith addressed the recent spate of viral clips from graduation ceremonies, like former Google CEO Eric Schmidt getting an earful at the University of Arizona, or the speaker in Florida who seemed surprised when students booed at the mention of AI as "the next industrial revolution." The videos speak to a broader societal sentiment around AI - the technology is deeply unpopular even as technology compani …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软明白了为什么学生会嘘那些鼓吹AI的毕业演讲者
zh.summary: 大学毕业生一直在嘘那些鼓吹人工智能的毕业典礼演讲者，微软的Brad Smith在一篇3100多字的博客文章中承认了这一趋势，认可了尽管科技行业热情高涨但公众对AI的更广泛怀疑。

title: The future of AI regulation is courting the strangest, most anxious bedfellows
summary: A Washington insider newsletter examines the shifting political landscape around AI regulation, describing a chaotic environment where unlikely coalitions are forming around regulatory policy.
content:
(L-R) Sen. Mike Rounds, Pamela Brown, Chris Malachowsky, Kevin O'Leary, Gabriele Caccia, Tammy Haddad, Michele L. Jawando, Sen. Mark Warner, Michael Kelly and Major General Patrick Ellis attend the Second Annual AI Honors. | Getty Images for Washington AI N	

Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about tech politics, tech influence, and tech shenanigans in Washington, DC. (If you're not a subscriber, you can get on board here.) We're back after a two-week hiatus, during most of which I was gallivanting in the Netherlands for a family wedding, and a trip to the Heineken Experience, which is, truly, an ~experience~.
Before I left, I asked everyone in Washington to please chill out while I was gone. This clearly did not happen, and I have returned to a political landscape that can be best described as that meme from Community where the room is on fire. Let's get into th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI监管的未来：最奇异、最焦虑的联盟
zh.summary: 一份华盛顿内部人士通讯审视了围绕AI监管政治格局的变化，描述了一个混乱的环境，其中不太可能的联盟正在围绕监管政策形成。

title: We managed to glean some interesting details about the Artemis III mission
summary: The Artemis III lunar mission has yielded new technical details following recent discussions between NASA and Blue Origin regarding mission execution and hardware.
content: "I was on the phone with Blue Origin leadership that night, all the next day, all through the weekend."

zh.title: 我们获得了关于阿尔忒弥斯III号任务的一些有趣细节
zh.summary: 在NASA和蓝色起源关于任务执行和硬件的最近讨论之后，阿尔忒弥斯III号月球任务产生了新的技术细节。

title: Google won’t just admit it’s feeding YouTube creators to its music AI
summary: Independent musicians are suing Google over claims it trained its Lyria music AI model on their YouTube-uploaded songs without permission, while Google moves to dismiss the case.
content:
A group of independent musicians is suing Google claiming it trained Lyria on their uploads. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge	

If you've uploaded a song to YouTube, Google almost certainly considers your video fair game for training its Lyria music AI, it just won't admit it right now. 
A group of independent musicians is suing Google, claiming that it illegally used songs they uploaded to YouTube to train its Lyria 3 model. Google has filed a motion to dismiss the case, saying:
Their lawsuit is based on the unsupported hypothesis that Google trained on their specific works. Even accepting their untested allegations as fact, the Complaint cannot stand. Plaintiffs each granted YouTube, and Google - which provides the service-a broad license to use the uploaded con …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌不愿承认它在用YouTube创作者的作品训练其音乐AI
zh.summary: 独立音乐人正在起诉谷歌，声称谷歌未经许可就用他们上传到YouTube的歌曲训练了其Lyria音乐AI模型，而谷歌正试图驳回该案件。

title: Nobody needs AI to search the Internet, court says in ruling against Google
summary: A German court ruled that artificial intelligence is not necessary for internet search functionality, a decision that could jeopardize the viability of AI-powered search products across the industry.
content: Google AI Overview court loss in Germany could spell doom for AI search industry.

zh.title: 法院在反对谷歌的裁决中表示互联网搜索不需要AI
zh.summary: 德国法院裁定，人工智能对互联网搜索功能不是必需的，这一决定可能危害整个行业中AI驱动的搜索产品的可行性。

title: Netflix expands revamped mobile app across Asia and doubles down on kids’ gaming
summary: Netflix is expanding its redesigned mobile application across Asian markets while intensifying its investment in gaming content targeted at children.
content: The media giant is pushing to expand its mobile and gaming business.

zh.title: Netflix在亚洲扩展改进的移动应用并加大对儿童游戏的投资
zh.summary: Netflix正在亚洲市场扩展其重新设计的移动应用程序，同时加强对针对儿童的游戏内容的投资。

title: ‘AI-pilled’ firms spend $7,500 per employee each month on AI
summary: Companies with high AI adoption are spending approximately $7,500 per employee monthly on AI infrastructure and services, a substantial operational cost approaching typical engineer salaries.
content: The most AI-obsessed firms are spending roughly $7,500 monthly per employee on AI, per Ramp AI Index. That's not more than an engineer's salary — yet.

zh.title: "AI成瘾"公司每月每位员工在AI上花费7500美元
zh.summary: 高度采用AI的公司每月每位员工大约花费7500美元用于AI基础设施和服务，这是一笔可观的运营成本，接近典型工程师的薪资。

title: You can just tell the Instagram algorithm what you want now
summary: Instagram is rolling out the Your Algorithm feature for its main feed, allowing users to view and modify the topics the algorithm believes they're interested in, with plans to add people, moods, and content-type customization.
content:
Instagram is going to let you tweak what its algorithm shows you on your main feed. With the Your Algorithm feature, "you can now see the topics we think you're interested in, and change them, across all the major parts of Instagram," according to Instagram boss Adam Mosseri. Right now, the feature will only surface topics, but Instagram is working on "supporting requests for people, different moods or vibes, content types, and more."
The company has been slowly giving users more agency over some algorithms on Instagram, having already launched the Your Algorithm feature for your Reels feed and the Explore page. With Wednesday's announcemen …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你现在可以直接告诉Instagram算法你想要什么
zh.summary: Instagram正在主信息流中推出"你的算法"功能，允许用户查看和修改算法认为他们感兴趣的主题，并计划添加人物、心情和内容类型自定义。

title: Cheap Iranian drone downed $25 million US Army helicopter—maybe by chance
summary: An inexpensive Iranian drone achieved a midair strike against a $25 million U.S. Army helicopter, an unlikely success that triggered American military retaliation against Iran.
content: The US military struck Iran again after an Iranian drone’s lucky midair strike.

zh.title: 廉价伊朗无人机击落2500万美元美陆军直升机——可能只是巧合
zh.summary: 一架价格低廉的伊朗无人机成功对一架价值2500万美元的美国陆军直升机进行了空中打击，这是一次令人意外的成功，随后触发了美国军方对伊朗的报复。

title: Amazon’s Echo speakers can now help kids wind down and fall asleep
summary: Amazon launched Sleep Studio, a feature for Echo smart speakers that combines bedtime stories, ambient sounds, and guided meditations to help children fall asleep, available through the Amazon Kids Plus subscription service.
content:
With Sleep Studio the Echo Glow can light up to let kids know when they should be sleeping or can get out of bed. | Image: Amazon	

Amazon has launched a new feature for its Echo and Echo Kids smart speakers called Sleep Studio that's designed to make the daily transition to bedtime more enticing for kids and less stressful for parents and caregivers. The feature uses a combination of bedtime stories, relaxing sounds, and guided meditations along with scheduling and customization options accessible only to adults.
Sleep Studio is now available to those with a $5.99 per month Amazon Kids Plus subscription at no extra cost. Amazon offers a free one month trial of the service, but purchasing an Echo Kids device will also get you a complementary six or 12-month subscription …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊Echo扬声器现在可以帮助孩子放松并入睡
zh.summary: 亚马逊推出了Sleep Studio功能，为Echo智能扬声器的用户提供睡前故事、环境音效和引导冥想的组合，帮助儿童入睡，该功能通过亚马逊儿童Plus订阅服务提供。

title: OB-GYNs release their own vaccine schedule, rejecting RFK Jr.'s meddling
summary: Obstetrics and gynecology medical groups have released an independent vaccine schedule to counter RFK Jr.'s vaccine skepticism, with endorsements from 13 additional medical organizations.
content: Thirteen other medical groups have already endorsed the independent schedule.

zh.title: 产科医生发布独立疫苗接种计划，拒绝小肯尼迪的干预
zh.summary: 妇产科医学团体发布了独立疫苗接种计划，以应对小肯尼迪的疫苗怀疑主义，获得了13个其他医学组织的支持。

title: Microsoft restricts Claude Fable for employees over data retention concerns
summary: Microsoft has restricted internal employee access to Claude Fable 5 due to Anthropic's new data retention requirements conflicting with Microsoft's Zero Data Retention policies, though the model remains available to external customers.
content:
Anthropic released Claude Fable, its first Mythos-class AI model, yesterday and it's already causing concerns inside Microsoft. Sources tell me that Microsoft is limiting the use of Claude Fable 5 for employees because of Anthropic's new data retention requirements. 
While Microsoft quickly rolled out Claude Fable 5 to its GitHub Copilot and Foundry customers, I'm told the model isn't available in the model picker that Microsoft employees use for internal versions of GitHub Copilot. All other Claude models are still available internally at Microsoft, because they operate under Zero Data Retention (ZDR) rules.
I understand that Microsoft ha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软因数据保留问题限制员工使用Claude Fable
zh.summary: 微软由于Anthropic的新数据保留要求与微软零数据保留政策相冲突，限制了员工对Claude Fable 5的内部访问权限，不过该模型仍可供外部客户使用。

title: The Indian government got cold feet on Starlink just before SpaceX’s IPO
summary: India's government has delayed Starlink's expansion due to regulatory concerns, a development that could undermine SpaceX's growth narrative ahead of its anticipated initial public offering.
content: Problems with Starlink's India expansion could challenge SpaceX's IPO growth story.

zh.title: 印度政府在SpaceX首次公开募股前对星链退缩
zh.summary: 印度政府因监管问题延迟了星链的扩展，这一发展可能会削弱SpaceX在预期首次公开募股前的增长叙事。

title: Valve kills its retail gift card program due to scammers
summary: Valve has discontinued its retail gift card program to combat fraud and scamming, a move that also eliminates legitimate purchasing options for customers who prefer to buy cards with physical cash.
content: Move also cuts off a massive market of legit users who buy cards with physical cash.

zh.title: Valve因诈骗关闭零售礼品卡计划
zh.summary: Valve为打击欺诈和骗局已停止其零售礼品卡计划，此举也消除了喜欢用现金购买卡券的客户的合法购买方式。

title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
summary: Recent research indicates that AI memory systems can actually degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic behavior in responses. The findings challenge common assumptions about the universal benefits of adding memory capabilities to AI models.
content: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

zh.title: 内存工具如何使AI模型性能下降
zh.summary: 最近研究表明，AI记忆系统实际上可能降低模型性能，并在回应中鼓励谄媚行为。这些发现挑战了关于向AI模型添加记忆功能普遍有益的常见假设。

title: The 2026 Honda Prelude review: Didn't expect such a head-turner
summary: The 2026 Honda Prelude hybrid coupe delivers compelling style and performance at $42,000 with excellent 44 mpg fuel efficiency and responsive handling. The vehicle offers an attractive option in the affordable sports coupe market segment.
content: Honda's $42,000 hybrid coupe looks great, handles well, and gets 44 mpg.

zh.title: 2026本田前奏混合动力跑车评测：没想到会这么引人注目
zh.summary: 2026年本田前奏混合动力跑车以42,000美元的价格提供出色的风格和性能，燃油效率达到44英里/加仑，操控反应灵敏。该车型在经济实惠的跑车市场提供了一个有吸引力的选择。

title: Zest launches a restaurant discovery app powered by where people actually eat
summary: Zest launched a restaurant discovery app that uses transaction data and AI to generate personalized recommendations based on users' actual dining habits. Backed by prominent VCs including Alexis Ohanian's 776, the app offers an alternative to traditional review-based platforms.
content: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent.

zh.title: Zest推出由实际就餐数据驱动的餐厅发现应用
zh.summary: Zest推出了一个餐厅发现应用，使用交易数据和AI根据用户的实际就餐习惯生成个性化推荐。该应用获得了包括Alexis Ohanian的776在内的知名风投支持，为传统评价平台提供了替代方案。

title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have raised concerns that Anthropic's Fable model has overly restrictive safety guardrails that hinder legitimate security research and testing. The criticism highlights the ongoing tension between AI safety measures and practical defensive security applications.
content: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

zh.title: 网络安全研究人员对Anthropic的Fable防护措施不满意
zh.summary: 网络安全研究人员已表示担忧，认为Anthropic的Fable模型的安全防护措施过于限制，妨碍了合法的安全研究和测试。这种批评突显了AI安全措施和实际防御性安全应用之间持续存在的紧张关系。

title: Why enterprise AI will be a major focus at VivaTech 2026
summary: Enterprise AI will be a major focus at VivaTech 2026, with European companies emphasizing integration into existing complex systems rather than consumer-facing LLMs. The conference reflects divergent regional approaches to AI adoption and investment priorities.
content: While Silicon Valley continues pushing aggressively into large language models and consumer-facing AI products, many European companies are focused on applying AI to complex systems already embedded into everyday life.

zh.title: 为什么企业AI将成为VivaTech 2026的主要焦点
zh.summary: 企业AI将成为VivaTech 2026的主要焦点，欧洲公司强调集成到现有复杂系统中，而不是面向消费者的大语言模型。该会议反映了全球对AI采用和投资优先级的不同地区性方法。

title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
summary: Niteshift, founded by Datadog veterans, raised $7 million in seed funding to develop an AI coding agent that avoids vendor lock-in. The startup believes companies will prioritize control and independence over dependencies on major AI model providers.
content: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

zh.title: Datadog资深员工创办AI编码初创公司Niteshift，押注反对大AI锁定
zh.summary: 由Datadog资深员工创办的Niteshift获得700万美元种子轮融资，用于开发避免供应商锁定的AI编码代理。该初创公司认为企业将优先考虑控制权和独立性，而非依赖主要AI模型提供商。

title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
summary: SpaceX's IPO valuation is heavily influenced by three ambitious hard-tech initiatives, with much of its worth tied to speculative space data center plans. The IPO reflects investor confidence in the company's transformative long-term projects.
content: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

zh.title: 推动SpaceX令人难以置信的IPO的三个硬技术登月计划
zh.summary: SpaceX的IPO估值受到三项雄心勃勃的硬技术倡议的重大影响，其价值很大一部分与推测性的太空数据中心计划有关。该IPO反映了投资者对该公司变革性长期项目的信心。

title: Pinterest bets on creators with Amazon Storefront integration
summary: Pinterest integrated Amazon Storefronts to enable creators to earn affiliate commissions and display product recommendations directly on the platform. The partnership strengthens Pinterest's creator monetization capabilities and commerce integration.
content: Pinterest is adding support for Amazon Storefronts, allowing creators to earn affiliate commissions more easily while showcasing their product recommendations in one place.

zh.title: Pinterest通过亚马逊店铺集成押注创作者
zh.summary: Pinterest集成了亚马逊店铺，使创作者能够赚取联盟佣金并直接在平台上展示产品推荐。该合作伙伴关系加强了Pinterest的创作者变现能力和商务集成。

title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
summary: Warner Music acquired Sureel AI to track how its artists' work is used in AI-generated content and AI training datasets. The acquisition reflects the music industry's escalating efforts to protect artist rights amid rapid AI adoption.
content: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

zh.title: 华纳音乐收购AI归属初创公司Sureel AI
zh.summary: 华纳音乐收购了Sureel AI，用以追踪其艺术家作品如何被用于AI生成内容和AI训练数据集。此次收购反映了音乐产业在快速AI采用中保护艺术家权益的不断升级的努力。

title: Racist comments targeting politicians tripled since Meta relaxed its rules
summary: Racist comments targeting politicians have tripled on Facebook since Meta relaxed its content moderation policies, with violent threats against lawmakers also surging significantly. The data demonstrates the real-world impact of reduced enforcement of platform safety rules.
content: Violent threats against lawmakers have also surged on Facebook.

zh.title: 自Meta放松政策后针对政治家的种族歧视评论增加了两倍
zh.summary: 自Meta放松其内容审核政策以来，Facebook上针对政治家的种族歧视评论增加了两倍，对立法者的暴力威胁也大幅增加。该数据证明了平台安全规则执法力度降低的现实影响。

title: GM Energy introduces V2G support and new energy storage battery chemistry
summary: General Motors announced vehicle-to-grid (V2G) capability and new battery chemistry for its energy storage solutions, with over 250,000 V2G-compatible EVs already in operation. The technology enables GM vehicles to both draw and provide power to the electrical grid, supporting grid stability and resilience. This positions GM as a leader in bidirectional EV charging infrastructure and grid integration technology.
content: There are more than a quarter of a million V2G-capable GM EVs on the roads already.

zh.title: 通用能源推出V2G支持和新电池化学技术
zh.summary: 通用汽车宣布了其能源存储解决方案的车对网(V2G)功能和新的电池化学技术,目前已有超过25万辆兼容V2G的电动汽车投入使用。该技术使通用汽车能够从电网中获取电力并为其提供电力,支持电网稳定性和弹性。这使通用汽车成为双向电动汽车充电基础设施和电网集成技术的领导者。

title: Decart’s new world model can simulate hours of photorealistic driving — with some caveats
summary: Decart is launching Oasis 3, a real-time world model that generates photorealistic driving environments for autonomous vehicle testing. The technology is now available via API for developers, advancing the tools available for AV development and testing.
content: Decart is launching Oasis 3, a real-time world model that generates photorealistic driving environments for autonomous vehicle testing, now available via API for developers to build on.

zh.title: Decart的新型世界模型可以模拟数小时的逼真驾驶——但有一些注意事项
zh.summary: Decart推出Oasis 3，一个实时世界模型，为自动驾驶汽车测试生成逼真的驾驶环境。该技术现已通过API供开发者使用，推进了自动驾驶开发和测试可用工具的发展。

title: Snapchat limits users under 16 to sharing Spotlights with friends
summary: Snapchat is implementing privacy controls for users under 16, restricting Spotlight sharing to only friends they follow back. This move addresses child safety concerns on the social platform.
content: Users under 16 years old will get a separate profile to show Stories and Spotlight posts to friends that they follow back.

zh.title: Snapchat限制16岁以下用户仅与朋友分享Spotlights
zh.summary: Snapchat为16岁以下的用户实施隐私控制，限制Spotlight分享仅限于他们相互关注的朋友。此举旨在解决社交平台上的儿童安全问题。

title: Why everyone’s an energy company now
summary: AI data center electricity demands are driving major corporations, including automakers GM and Ford, to invest in energy storage and power generation. This shift reflects the growing infrastructure needs of the AI boom.
content: Electricity demand from AI data centers is pushing everyone — including automakers like GM and Ford — into the energy storage business.

zh.title: 为什么现在每个人都成了能源公司
zh.summary: AI数据中心的电力需求促使包括通用汽车和福特等主要企业投资能源存储和发电。这一转变反映了AI繁荣期日益增长的基础设施需求。

title: Avalanche’s desktop fusion reactor delivers blistering-hot plasma
summary: Fusion startup Avalanche Energy demonstrated its desktop fusion reactor prototype by heating plasma to over 10 million degrees Celsius. The achievement marks significant progress toward commercial fusion power generation.
content: Fusion power startup Avalanche Energy said its reactor prototype heated a plasma to over 10 million degrees C.

zh.title: 雪崩公司的桌面聚变反应堆输出极热等离子体
zh.summary: 聚变初创公司Avalanche Energy展示了其桌面聚变反应堆原型，通过将等离子体加热到超过1000万摄氏度。这一成就标志着朝向商业聚变发电的重大进展。

title: Why two SpaceX alumni are betting on solar and batteries to power the AI craze
summary: SpaceX alumni co-founders of Ambrosia Energy are developing rapid-deployment solar and battery power plants to meet AI infrastructure demand. The company aims to undercut natural gas pricing while building gigawatts of capacity by 2030.
content: Ambrosia Energy wants to build power plants in less than 12 months while undercutting natural gas. It hopes to build gigawatts worth by 2030.

zh.title: 为什么两位SpaceX校友押注太阳能和电池来推动AI热潮
zh.summary: Ambrosia Energy的两位SpaceX校友联合创始人正在开发快速部署的太阳能和电池发电厂以满足AI基础设施需求。该公司目标是降低天然气价格同时在2030年前建设吉瓦级容量。

title: The three sets of earbuds I reach for
summary: An experienced audio reviewer shares their three most-used earbuds, including the Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro, which excels in call quality and noise cancellation. The piece provides practical insights for consumers evaluating premium earbud options.
content:
I listen to a lot of earbuds, but these three I actually use all the time. | Photo: John Higgins / The Verge	

I have been an audio reviewer for 20 years. My time as a freelance headphones panelist at Wirecutter, and the multitude of reviews I’ve written for sites like Reviewed, Digital Trends, IGN, and now The Verge, have given me the chance to listen to hundreds of earbuds. Some were truly excellent, and some were pretty hideous. Honestly, they tend to blur together as I move from new earbud to new earbud. But when something worthwhile comes around, it gets and holds my attention. These are the three sets that I reach for most often right now.
Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro


Score: 8

ProsCons


Incredible call quality
Great ANC
Useful case screen

Default sound profile needs tweaking



Where to Buy:

 $169.99 at Amazon
 $169.99 at Anker
 $169.99 at B&H Photo

For ages I relied on the Apple AirPods Pro — first the Pro 2 and then the Pro 3. But the new $170 Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro have been my go-to earbuds for the past month. I’m using them to listen to Lofi Girl as I write this. Their sound quality is really good after you use the Soundcore app to fine-tune the frequency response (out of the box the bass is too high, which causes vocals to get muddy and snare hits to be muffled). They fit my ears securely, and since they have an IP55 rating, I could see myself using them on a run in a pinch — though I prefer running with my Powerbeats Fit buds (see below). And they also support the LDAC high-res audio codec with supported devices (sorry, iPhone users).
Noise cancellation is also top-notch and comparable to more expensive earbuds like the Apple AirPods Pro 3 (which we’ll get to in a few paragraphs). The Soundcore buds let in a little more midrange, but handle low-end drone with no problem.
But call quality is the Liberty 5 Pro’s greatest strength. I’ve never heard earbuds that block out as much ambient noise, allowing me to sound clear on my calls and in meetings. Whet

zh.title: 我常用的三副耳塞
zh.summary: 一位经验丰富的音频评测员分享了他们最常使用的三副耳塞，包括在通话质量和降噪方面表现优异的Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro。该文为消费者评估高端耳塞选项提供了实用见解。

title: BYD to install thousands of 5-minute EV chargers across Europe
summary: Chinese EV maker BYD plans to install 3,000 ultra-fast Flash Chargers across Europe by end of 2027, with 1,500kW capacity significantly exceeding Tesla's existing infrastructure. The $2 billion investment represents a major competitive push into the European market.
content:
Chinese EV colossus BYD has announced plans to speed up its conquest of the European auto market with the rollout of superfast Flash Chargers across the continent. BYD has already installed the first new chargers in Germany and the UK, and plans to roll out 3,000 across Europe by the end of next year.
At an estimated cost of €580,000 (about $670,000) per charger according to the Financial Times, that would mean a total spend of roughly $2 billion to install the network. The 1,500kW charging stations are significantly more powerful than Tesla's 500kW V4 Superchargers, though Tesla already has 20,000 chargers installed in Europe. BYD, which h …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 比亚迪将在欧洲安装数千个5分钟快充器
zh.summary: 中国电动汽车制造商比亚迪计划在2027年底前在欧洲安装3000个超快速闪速充电器,其1500kW容量明显超过特斯拉现有基础设施。这项20亿美元的投资代表了进入欧洲市场的重大竞争举措。

title: Xbox exploring ‘radically different’ console business models
summary: Microsoft is reconsidering its next-generation Project Helix console strategy and exploring alternative business models to make hardware more affordable and flexible. The shift reflects the company's response to market challenges and changing consumer needs.
content:
The RAMageddon crisis has got Microsoft rethinking its Xbox console hardware business. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma and Xbox strategy chief Matthew Ball have both revealed this week that Microsoft is reevaluating plans for its next-generation Project Helix console and exploring "radically different" console business models in the meantime.
"We are working very hard to rethink everything that we can about Helix, which is a console we are committed to shipping, and we are very cognizant of the ways in which we need to change as a company to make sure it is affordable, to make sure that it's flexible," said Ball in an interview with The Game Business  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox探索"截然不同"的游戏机业务模式
zh.summary: 微软正在重新考虑其下一代Project Helix游戏机策略,并探索替代业务模式以使硬件更便宜灵活。这一转变反映了该公司对市场挑战和不断变化的消费者需求的回应。

title: Microsoft is disabling Office 2019 for Mac next month
summary: Microsoft is disabling Office 2019 for Mac by stopping certificate validation next month, forcing users to upgrade to Office 2024 or Microsoft 365. This move contradicts the company's earlier promise that Office 2019 apps would continue functioning indefinitely.
content:
Microsoft's Office 2019 apps for Mac will stop working next month, because the company isn't renewing a certificate that validates Office licenses. Owners of Office 2019 for Mac are being warned they'll have to purchase Office 2024 or a Microsoft 365 subscription if they want to continue editing documents.
Microsoft previously promised that "all your Office 2019 apps will continue to function," when it announced end of support in 2023. The company then quietly updated that support note last month to remove the mention of apps continuing to function, replacing it with "Rest assured that all your Office 2019 apps won't lose any data."
Starti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软将在下个月停用Mac版Office 2019
zh.summary: 微软将通过停止证书验证在下个月禁用Mac版Office 2019,迫使用户升级到Office 2024或Microsoft 365。此举与该公司早前承诺Office 2019应用程序将继续无限期运行的承诺相矛盾。

title: Waymo says it built a better benchmark for comparing robotaxis to humans
summary: Waymo developed a new computational model to compare how its robotaxis perform against human drivers in crash scenarios. The research helps improve autonomous vehicle safety and decision-making in real-world situations.
content: Waymo created a new computer model to help it better understand how humans behave in crash scenarios that its robotaxis encounter.

zh.title: Waymo表示建立了更好的基准来比较自动驾驶出租车与人类驾驶
zh.summary: Waymo开发了一个新的计算模型来比较其自动驾驶出租车与人类驾驶员在碰撞场景中的表现。这项研究有助于改进自动驾驶汽车的安全性和在实际情况中的决策能力。

title: Waymo built a virtual driver to study how humans react to surprises on the road
summary: Waymo created a computer-based cognitive model simulating how human drivers make split-second crash-avoidance decisions, detailed in a Nature Communications paper. The model will help develop safer autonomous vehicles by understanding human reflexes and decision patterns.
content:
Waymo has a lot of experience building virtual systems to help its autonomous vehicles better understand the real world. It built realistic 3D worlds to better anticipate natural disasters and unpredictable edge cases. It created a virtual representation of a hyperattentive driver to test against its own autonomous vehicles in a series of simulated scenarios to see which is better at crash avoidance.
Now, in a new research paper published today in Nature Communications, Waymo describes a new computer-based cognitive model that explains how human drivers make split-second decisions to avoid crashes. The company thinks the new model will serv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Waymo创建了虚拟驾驶员来研究人类如何对道路上的意外情况做出反应
zh.summary: Waymo创建了一个基于计算机的认知模型，模拟人类驾驶员如何做出瞬间避撞决策，其详细内容发表在《自然通讯》杂志上。该模型将通过理解人类反射和决策模式来帮助开发更安全的自动驾驶汽车。

title: WhatsApp ordered to host rival AI assistants for free
summary: The European Commission ordered Meta to allow rival AI chatbots free access to WhatsApp while investigating potential antitrust violations. This is the EU's second emergency interim measure in over 20 years, protecting competition in the AI assistant market.
content:
Meta has been ordered by the European Commission to restore free WhatsApp access for chatbots made by rival AI providers while the regulator finishes its antitrust investigation. The rare interim measure announced on Tuesday was deemed necessary "to prevent serious and irreparable damage to competition" in the general-purpose AI assistant market.
This is only the second time that the EU has used the emergency power in more than 20 years, Politico reports. It follows the launch of a formal investigation in December 2025 into whether Meta was abusing its market dominance by banning third-party AI chatbots from its WhatsApp messaging platform. …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: WhatsApp被要求免费托管竞争对手的AI助手
zh.summary: 欧盟委员会命令Meta允许竞争对手的AI聊天机器人免费访问WhatsApp，同时调查潜在的反垄断违规行为。这是欧盟二十多年来第二次采取紧急临时措施，以保护AI助手市场的竞争。

title: Meta signs first AI data center deal in India with Reliance
summary: Meta is establishing its first AI data center in India through a partnership with Reliance, with a 168-megawatt capacity designed to support the company's global AI computing infrastructure and future expansion.
content: The 168-megawatt facility will support Meta's global AI computing needs and can be expanded over time.

zh.title: Meta与印度信实公司签署首个AI数据中心协议
zh.summary: Meta通过与信实公司的合作在印度建立其第一个AI数据中心，容量为168兆瓦，旨在支持该公司的全球AI计算基础设施和未来扩展。

title: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold squeezes a lot of functionality into a tiny folding mouse
summary: Logitech unveiled the Mobi Fold, a $79.99 travel mouse that folds clamshell-style to a compact 2.6×2.5 inches while maintaining full-sized functionality and featuring a month-long battery life and touch scrolling panel.
content:
The Mobi Fold feels like a full-sized mouse when opened and includes a touch panel for scrolling.	

Logitech finally announced its new ultraportable travel mouse following leaked marketing images that spoiled the surprise last month. As the name implies, the Mobi Fold is a compact mouse that can  fold in half using a hinge that can pivot about 130 degrees. At $79.99 in graphite, off-white, lilac, and sand color options, the Mobi Fold isn’t Logitech’s lightest or cheapest mouse, but it’s definitely one of its smallest and a well-featured alternative to your laptop’s trackpad if you can get used to some unconventional ergonomics.
The arch-shaped Mobi Fold looks similar to other folding devices, like the Surface Arc mouse. But while Microsoft’s design folds flat, making it thinner and easier to slip into a pocket or bag, the Mobi Fold is more like a clamshell cellphone. And even though it doesn’t snap shut with a satisfying clunk, it feels durable. Logitech says the hinge was “tested to withstand 15 years of daily use.”




That hinge, along with more than half the mouse, is wrapped in a silicone skin that improves grip while semi-protecting it from drops. Where it covers the hinge you’ll find a pleated design that expands and stretches when the mouse is folded in half, so there’s no risk of pinching. 
At 79 grams the Mobi Fold is a few grams heavier than Logitech’s Pebble Mouse 2 and the bare-bones M196 that I’ve been recently traveling with. When folded, the mouse is a little over three-quarters of an inch tall and about 2.6×2.5 inches in size, making it feel seriously compact. It reminds me of some wireless earbud cases, but a bit thinner.




Logitech claims the Mobi Fold’s rechargeable battery will power the mouse for up to one month on a full charge, while a 1-minute quick charge will keep it going for up to 22 hours. It’s getting a global release. which means we can probably thank recent EU regulations for a removable cover on the underside allowing that recharg

zh.title: 罗技新款Mobi Fold折叠鼠标将大量功能压缩到小巧的设计中
zh.summary: 罗技推出了售价79.99美元的Mobi Fold旅行鼠标，采用翻盖折叠式设计，折叠后仅为2.6×2.5英寸，同时保持全尺寸功能，具有长达一个月的电池续航时间和触摸滚动面板。

title: Top Lucid Motors executive departs amid new CEO’s leadership shakeup
summary: Lucid Motors' SVP of engineering and digital, Emad Dlala, has departed the company just months after promotion, signaling leadership restructuring under the company's new CEO.
content: The exec, Emad Dlala, has left just a few months after being promoted to SVP of engineering and digital, TechCrunch has learned.

zh.title: Lucid Motors高管离职 新任CEO领导下的管理层改组
zh.summary: Lucid Motors工程和数字副总裁Emad Dlala在升职数月后离职，表明该公司在新任CEO领导下正在进行管理层重组。

title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
summary: Google has reduced prices for its budget AI subscription tier, escalating competition in the AI service market. This move signals Google's intent to compete more aggressively on pricing against rivals like OpenAI and Microsoft.
content: Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.

zh.title: 谷歌在AI订阅价格战中打响了一枪
zh.summary: 谷歌降低了其预算AI订阅层的价格，加剧了AI服务市场的竞争。这一举动表明谷歌打算在定价上与OpenAI和微软等竞争对手更积极地竞争。
